## Category Coverage

- **Authentication API**: signup validation, duplicate email detection, password hashing

## How to Run

These tests are Python + Playwright scripts generated by TestSprite. They run against a live instance of the app at `http://localhost:3000`.

```bash
# Ensure the app is running
cd mcpforge-app && npm run build && npm start

# Tests are executed via TestSprite MCP tooling
```
